## Description
A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Run `nc ...`
2. Type `...`
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
What should happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happens.

## NC Code (if applicable)
```
show "hello"
```

## Environment
- OS: [e.g., macOS 15, Ubuntu 24.04]
- NC Version: [e.g., v1.0.0]
- AI Provider: [e.g., OpenAI, Ollama, none]
